creator: muh.muhten@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 177435
proposed patch

The zsh completions distributed with git are superseded by a better-maintained version distributed with zsh itself, and there's little use for the zsh completions if zsh is not also installed.

Installation to site-functions causes the inferior git completions to override those distributed with zsh. Moreover, because git's zsh completions look for the corresponding bash completions in the same directories, they didn't work anyway.
